name: Potato Pancakes with Juniper
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and grate them.
2. Season with salt, pepper, finely grated orange zest, and pulverized juniper berries.
3. Divide the mixture into six flattened heaps.
4. Fry in batches in a mixture of butter and oil until golden-brown and crisp on both sides.
5. Drain on crumpled kitchen paper.
6. Keep the pancakes hot (uncovered) in a low oven while you cook the rest.
